hero.title: Football Trivia Master
hero.subtitle: 450+ timed questions · 4 categories · 12 languages
hero.description: Know the game. Prove it. Fast-paced football quiz with streaks, timers, and global leaderboards — clubs, national teams, legendary finals, and major tournaments.

items.title: Four themed categories
items.description: World Football, National Teams, Global Finals, and Tournament Spotlight.

items.title: Race the clock
items.description: Timed questions with Easy (20s), Medium (15s), or Hard (12s). Enable Hard Mode for 12s every round.

items.title: Streaks & scoring
items.description: Chain correct answers for up to +50% streak bonus and a big perfect-round bonus for 10/10.

items.title: Compete globally
items.description: Game Center (iOS) and Play Games (Android) for achievements and leaderboards.

items.title: 12 languages
items.description: Arabic, Chinese, English, French, German, Hebrew, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish.

items.title: Play your way
items.description: Dark or light theme, detailed stats, optional one-time ad removal, GDPR consent in Settings.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of Football Trivia Master, a trivia game operated by Zuki Apps. By downloading, installing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section19.title: Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: Football Trivia Master collects minimal information necessary to provide the service. Game progress and statistics are stored locally on your device. We may collect information you provide when you contact support.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information to provide and improve our services. Locally stored data is not transmitted to our servers except as needed for optional features.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate security measures. Your game data is stored locally on your device.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You can clear local data via the app's Settings. You may delete the app at any time.

section6.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
section6.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy in the app or on our website.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

howToUse.title: How to play
howToUse.subtitle: A full round takes about 3–5 minutes. No account required — sign in only for leaderboards.

steps.title: Tap Start Game
steps.description: From the home screen. Optionally toggle Hard Mode for 12 seconds per question.

steps.title: Pick a category
steps.description: All Categories for a mix, or focus on one of four themed pools.

steps.title: Answer 10 questions
steps.description: Tap one of four options before the timer runs out. Correct answers build your streak.

steps.title: Review your results
steps.description: See score breakdown, accuracy, and any achievements unlocked.

steps.title: Climb the leaderboard
steps.description: Sign in via Play Games or Game Center, then open Leaderboard from home.

items.question: Is Football Trivia Master free?
items.answer: Yes. The app is free to download and play. Optional banner and interstitial ads appear between sessions. You can remove ads permanently with a one-time in-app purchase in Settings.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No account is required to play trivia. Sign in with Game Center (iOS) or Google Play Games (Android) only if you want leaderboards and achievements.

items.question: Which devices are supported?
items.answer: iPhone and iPad (iOS) and Android phones and tablets. The app is optimized for portrait play.

items.question: What languages are available?
items.answer: Arabic, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), English, French, German, Hebrew, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Spanish. Change language in Settings → Language.

items.question: How many questions are in a round?
items.answer: Each round has 10 multiple-choice questions unless you quit early.

items.question: What is Hard Mode on the home screen?
items.answer: Hard Mode limits every question to 12 seconds and can unlock special achievements. It is separate from choosing Hard difficulty in a category — use it when you want maximum challenge.

items.question: How does scoring work?
items.answer: Points come from question difficulty, a time bonus (answer with at least half the timer left), streak multipliers (up to +50% after 5 correct in a row), and a perfect-round bonus when you get 10/10. Tap the ? icon on the home screen for the in-app scoring guide.

items.question: Can I play offline?
items.answer: Yes. Questions are stored in the app. Leaderboards, achievements, ads, and purchases need an internet connection.

items.question: Why can't I see the leaderboard?
items.answer: On Android, sign in to Google Play Games when prompted. On iOS, enable Game Center for the app. If sign-in fails, update the app, check your Google/Apple account, and try again from Settings.

items.question: Are leaderboards global?
items.answer: Yes. Scores are submitted to platform leaderboards (Game Center / Play Games) for your region and friends.

items.question: How do I remove ads?
items.answer: Open Settings → Remove Ads and complete the one-time purchase. Use Retry if the store is slow to respond. Restore purchases on a new device via the same store account.

items.question: Why do I still see ads after purchasing?
items.answer: Ensure the purchase finished (check email receipt). Tap Restore in Settings. Force-quit and reopen the app. Contact support if the issue persists with your store receipt.

items.question: Are there subscriptions?
items.answer: No. Ad removal is a one-time purchase, not a subscription.

items.question: What data do you collect?
items.answer: See our Privacy Policy at zukiapps.com/football-trivia/privacy. Crash reports may be sent via Firebase Crashlytics to improve stability. Ad partners may collect data per your consent choices in Settings.

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: Email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com or use Feedback in the app (Settings → Send Feedback).

items.question: Is this an official FIFA or World Cup app?
items.answer: No. Football Trivia Master is independent entertainment by Zuki Apps. We are not affiliated with FIFA, any federation, league, club, or tournament organizer.

tips.title: Pro tips
tips.subtitle: Small habits that add up on the leaderboard.

items.title: Protect your streak
items.description: Streak multipliers cap at +50% (5 correct in a row). One wrong answer resets to zero.

items.title: Chase the time bonus
items.description: Answer with at least half the timer left for up to +50 bonus points per question.

items.title: Perfect rounds pay off
items.description: +150 points for 10/10 — often more than two average questions combined.

items.title: Warm up with All Categories
items.description: Mixed rounds expose weak spots. Check Statistics and drill your lowest category.

items.title: Sign in before a serious run
items.description: Open Leaderboard once per session to confirm Game Center / Play Games is connected.

items.title: Match language to your knowledge
items.description: Questions are localized — switch in Settings if another language suits you better.
